Reviewer Guide: Use this to keep interviews aligned.
Can the candidate explain the problem in plain English?
__EMPTY: They should explain the user problem before talking about the tech stack.

Reviewer Guide: Did the candidate choose a reasonable MVP?
__EMPTY: A thoughtful small solution should score better than an unfinished big idea.
They should know what they calculated and why it matters.

Reviewer Guide: Can they explain their code and AI use?
__EMPTY: AI use is fine, but they must understand what they built.
The product should guide a developer, not only report numbers.
